subject: Fermi GRB 220223A: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(Irkutsk State University, API),

M.L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, OAGH)

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-IAC robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Spain (IAC Teide Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB 220223A ( Fermi GBM team, GCN 31640) errorbox  66009 sec after notice time and 66035 sec after trigger time at 2022-02-23 20:35:52 UT, with upper limit up to  18.4 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 68 deg. The sun  altitude  is -22.1 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -75 deg., longitude l = 186 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1892013

We obtain a following upper limits.
